'''Arawynne''' was a [[Ghostling]] [[Prince/Legends|princess]] who was sold to [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Elder]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Kitster Chanchani Banai]] freed her from the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] estate.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]''
*''[[Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine]]''
